creator: mirya@zoc.com.ua
text:
After recent fusefs-libs update gphotofs stopped working, so while it was
possible to mount my camera with old fusefs-libs, it fails now with new one
(libgphoto2 stays the same, rebuilding of fusefs-gphotofs port didn't help):

# gphotofs /camera
fuse: unknown option `subtype=gphotofs'
umount: /dev/fuse8: unknown file system
#

How-To-Repeat: # gphotofs /camera
fuse: unknown option `subtype=gphotofs'
umount: /dev/fuse8: unknown file system
#
